description: Traceroute topology and probe health. Shared nodes and edges are deduplicated by address so selecting multiple destinations produces a branching tree/graph.

spec.description: Minimum final-destination success across all selected traceroutes.
spec.title: Destination reached

spec.description: Selected traceroute destinations and their current metadata.
spec.title: Selected destinations

spec.description: Minimum traceroute process exit status across selected targets.
spec.title: Command

spec.description: Maximum parsed hop number across selected targets.
spec.title: Maximum hops

spec.description: Maximum elapsed traceroute command time across selected targets.
spec.title: Probe duration

spec.description: Maximum loop detection state across selected targets.
spec.title: Routing loop

spec.description: Maximum loop give-up state across selected targets.

spec.description: Apache ECharts topology. Horizontal node position is cumulative RTT, so horizontal spacing is proportional to latency. Requires Volkov Labs Business Charts 7.x.
spec.title: Traceroute topology — distance by latency

spec.description: Average round-trip time reported for each responding hop.
spec.title: Hop average RTT

spec.description: Fraction of probes without a reply for each hop.
spec.title: Hop probe loss

title: Traceroute Topology
